headline: 5 Insightful Analyst Questions From MSCI’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: MSCI's first quarter was marked by strong execution across both traditional and newer product lines, driving a positive market response. Management credited the quarter’s momentum to aggressive sales strategies, rapid product launches, and deeper integration of artificial intelligence (AI) throughout its business. CEO Henry Fernandez highlighted that recurring subscription run rate growth reached a multi-year high, with record sales in the Asia Pacific region and notable gains in custom indices
